content.text:
Checking the current branch and whether it's been merged into the default branch.

[REDACTED]

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git branch --show-current && git status -sb && git remote -v
cd /workspaces/agno && git fetch origin 2>&1; git branch -a --merged origin/main 2>/dev/null | head -20; echo "---"; git branch -a --no-merged origin/main 2>/dev/null | head -20
input.description: Fetch and check merge status vs main

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && gh pr list --head feat/provisioner-project-name-validation --state all --json number,title,state,mergedAt,merged,baseRefName,url 2>&1
input.description: Check PR merge status for current branch

input.command: cd /workspaces/agno && git log origin/main..HEAD --oneline 2>&1 | head -10; echo "---"; git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline 2>&1 | head -5
cd /workspaces/agno && gh pr list --head feat/provisioner-project-name-validation --state all --json number,title,state,mergedAt,baseRefName,url
input.description: Get PR details for current branch
Commits on branch not in main

content.text:
**Not fully merged.** You're on `feat/provisioner-project-name-validation`, which is only partly on `main`.

### What was merged
[PR #246](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/246) merged into `main` on **June 16, 2026** from this branch:
- `fix(provisioner): reject project names with spaces or special characters` (squash-merged as `bed06c1`)

### What's still open
[PR #256](https://github.com/trilogy-group/ab-agno/pull/256) is **still open** and includes these commits not on `main` yet:

1. `74ed400` — reject leading/trailing hyphens in project names  
2. `feba601` — exclude operator scripts from customer repos and align Cloud Run deploy  

`git branch --no-merged origin/main` also lists this branch, which matches that partial state.

**Summary:** The first validation change landed via #246; the hyphen validation and operator-script/Cloud Run changes are still pending in #256.

[REDACTED]
